---
title: "Teaching"
---

::: {.section-title}
## Teaching

Current and recent teaching in economics, health economics, and behavioural economics.
:::

::: {.grid-2}
::: {.card}
### ECON2112 Health Economics and Finance
Lecturer and Course Coordinator, Newcastle Business School. Topics include healthcare markets, insurance, economic evaluation, financing, incentives, and health policy.
:::
::: {.card}
### ECON3111 Behavioural Economics
Lecturer and Course Coordinator, Newcastle Business School. Topics include bounded rationality, heuristics, nudges, social preferences, risk, time preferences, and applications to health and policy.
:::
::: {.card}
### ECON3011 Health Economics & Finance
Lecturer and Course Coordinator. Advanced applications in health economics, finance, policy evaluation, and decision making.
:::
::: {.card}
### Student learning approach
Research-led teaching using applied datasets, policy case studies, choice experiments, and practical economic reasoning.
:::
:::
